svg.title: Notification delivery platform architecture
svg.desc: A queue-driven notification platform running on Amazon EKS. Internal services enqueue jobs in Amazon ElastiCache for Redis, scalable notification worker pods consume them, read data from an Amazon RDS for MySQL read replica through VPC peering, and send messages to a third-party messaging API through a NAT Gateway and Internet Gateway. GitHub Actions, a GitOps repository, Amazon ECR, Argo CD, and an in-cluster observability stack support delivery and operations.
svg.text: Queue-driven workers · private workloads · no public ingress
